items.latest_viewpoint_zh: 最新观点：NEWS: For the first time, NVIDIA’s AI supercomputers will be built entirely in the U.S. — working with leading manufacturing partners to design and build factories. Production has also started for NVIDIA Blackwell chips at TSMC’s chip plant（主题：AI Industry）
